empty.title: No bank accounts connected
empty.description: Connect your bank account to automatically import transactions.

settings.title: Bank Connections
settings.connectNewBankDescription: Securely connect your bank accounts via open banking to automatically import transactions
settings.emptyDescription: Connect your first bank account to start tracking your finances automatically.

accountCard.disconnectDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect this bank account? This will remove the connection to {bank}. Your existing transactions will be preserved, but no new transactions will be synced.

connection.disconnectDescription: This will disconnect all {count, plural, one {# account} other {# accounts}} linked to {bank}. Your existing transactions will be preserved, but no new transactions will be synced.

connectButton.limitDescription: Upgrade your plan to connect more bank accounts.

connect.title: Connect a Bank
connect.description: Select your bank to securely connect via open banking.
connect.errorLoadingBanks: Failed to load banks. Please try again.
connect.limitExceeded: Bank connection limit reached. Upgrade your plan to connect more accounts.
connect.errorCreatingLink: Failed to start bank connection. Please try again.
